title: EXTREMELY Optimized with Vulkan | 2000+ "FPS Boost"
description: This modpack aims to use a Minecraft mod which attempts to rewrite Minecraft in the Vulkan rendering engine along with a bunch of other smaller optimized processes to make Minecraft go brrt.
body:
"Extremely Optimised" (Minecraft Modpack with Vulkan in it)

Extremely Optimised ss a modpack that uses Vulkan and a variety of performance mods to optimise Minecraft: Java Edition proformance. Works best on Higher End graphics cards. ![A comparason of Extremely Optimised (This modpack) and Vanilla Minecraft with no mods at all, Vanilla Minecraft gets 488 and Extremely Optimised gets 2475 Frames per second](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/322ce2bc558158fe18046df035d6efae963878d8.png) (What do you think of Vulkan Optimised logo? I spent a alot of time making it.)
